title: Happy.appの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: 1. Add one new DOM-focused test file: [test-ui-dom-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-ui-dom-contract.js). Assert `#packet-preview` actually updates after input/capture changes (not just element existence): JSON must include `captureIntent` and `targetSink`. 2. In the same DOM test, assert `#secretary-captures` rendering behavior with two cases: - seeded state with a secretary output renders at least one `.capture-row` and file path text. - seeded state without captures shows the empty-state copy (`No secretary captures yet`). 3. Strengthen raw-terminal non-exposure gate in [test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh): scan HTML plus app sources (`src/**/*.js`) and fail on `xterm|node-pty|pty|stdin|stdout|websocket shell|iframe.*terminal`, not only `index.html`. 4. Add dependency-level guard in [test-state-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh): assert [package.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/package.json) does not introduce `xterm`/`node-pty`-class packages, so non-exposure cannot regress via deps alone.
